answer:
The magnitude of the resultant of two vectors depends on the angle between them, ranging from the absolute difference to the sum. For 3 N and 4 N, the resultant can be any value from 1 N to 7 N. Among the options, 5 N is possible when the vectors are perpendicular, and 6 N, 7 N, 4 N, 2 N, and 1 N are also possible at various angles, but 9 N, 8 N, and 0 N are not possible.  

\boxed{F}
